ead.archdesc:
======= RMA03439Cornell University banners, clothing, and other textiles47-7-3439Compiled by RMC StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
October 20142B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:

English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University banners, clothing, and other textiles
Cornell University
47-7-3439
48 items. 48 items.
1875-2015.
Memorabilia. Banners, pennants, pillows, runners, and other cloth items. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 1293 1018 2455 2718 2456 1213 1460 29 - mu-1214 66 - mu-1220 66 - mu-1221 29 - mu-1215 29 - mu-1345 29 - mu-1353 71 - mu-1291 ======= 1293 1018 2455 2718 2456 1213 1460 29 - mu-1214 66 - mu-1220 66 - mu-1221 29 - mu-1215 29 - mu-1345 29 - mu-1353 71 - mu-1291 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 5616014
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Jude Corina
Date completed:
October 2014
EAD encoding:
Jude Corina, October 2014
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, July 2018
RELATED MATERIALS
See Stephen J. Roberts Papers, #24-2-2903, for an additional banner.
See also Cigarette silk collection, #6612, for additional Cornell University related textiles.
Cite As:
Cornell University Banners, Clothing, and Other Textiles, #47-7-3439. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Scope and content
Banners, pennants, pillows, runners, jackets, blazers, reunion items, graduation robes and regalia, stuffed animal mascots, and other cloth items. Examples include a Cornell University doctoral hood, originally owned by Dr. William J. Edens, Ph.D. 1937 and Class of 1941 blazer owned by Arthur Townsend Klinger.
Cornell University -- : Insignia. Cornell University. Class of 1901 Cornell Univesity. Class of 1910 Cornell University. Class of 1920. Cornell University. Class of 1927 Cornell University. Class of 1932 Cornell University. Class of 1938 Cornell University. Class of 1941 Cornell University. Class of 1942 Cornell University. Class of 1944 Cornell University. Class of 1945 Cornell University. Class of 1952. Cornell University. Class of 1957 Cornell University. Class of 1955 Cornell University. Class of 1956 Cornell University. Class of 2015

1952MU-2056195211Patchwork quilt by Dilbert H. Decker, class of 1886MU-32812Red Wool Felt Pillow with "Cornell" in whiteMU-1019n.d.3Cornell pillow (small)MU-1220n.d.66Cornell blanket/rug (small)MU-1221n.d.66Felt Cornell pillow cover owned by Guy GundakerMU-1212n.d.12 pillowcases with red satin trim, embroidered wheel and signaturesMU-533 & 5341897-19015
Scope and Contents
MU-533: Signature of women
MU-534: Signatures of men with date of graduationCornell woven blanketMU-247614Red and white felt pillow coverMU-843191215Red cloth napkins with Cornell University logo printed on themMU-3004a-3004h1960-196917Red cloth table runner with Cornell MU-33991960-196917Hand-embroidered pillow case with the Cornell insigniaMU-3620Undated
Scope and Contents
The letter "G" is embroidered on verso.Cornell pillow with tasselsMU-39251916Beige pillow with Cornell embroidered in red. Red rope lines the edges with red tassels in upper left corner.21Series III: Cloth and clothingArmband "CHF" red w/white lettersMU-59411Straw hat with "Cornell" written on ribbonMU-1018PhD hood with gold velvet liningMU-127Date unknown15Blanchard Livingston Rideout graduation regaliaMU-2718Undated
Scope and Contents
Includes two robes one with Cornell seal embroidered on a field of blue, hoods, and mortar boards. One cap has initials BLR inside. Some of these items were worn while Rideout led President Frank Rhodes' 1977 inauguration procession.Armband, "'01", purple with white lettersMU-59111Armbands with buttonsMU-1214, MU-1353190429Seal and Serpent hatMU-12571905Kenneth C. Newman, Class of 1910, reunion jacketMU-2991Date unknown16Kenneth C. Newman, Class of 1910, reunion hatMU-2992Undated16Class of 1920 green silk vestMU-450192015Cornell Fine PercaleMU-31501920-193017
Scope and Contents
52" by 36" piece of white-dotted indigo percale, with label depicting Cornell Crew member standing on dock. Manufactured by W.P. Co.Class of 1927 scarfMU-36221927
Scope and Contents
Red silk scarf with "C27" printed in corner.Class of 1927 vestMU-36211927
Scope and Contents
Red and white vertical stripes with "C27" on chest.Class of 1932 vestMU-1069193215ShawlMU-1215193429Ph.D. hood owned by William EdensMU-1291193771Cornell blazerMU-12131938Straw hat with "'40" written on itMU-24561940Class of 1941 blazer owned by Arthur Townsend KlingerMU-14601941Class of 1942 Reunion jacket & cummerbundMU-12931942Class of 1952 beaniesMU-2972, MU-2973195215Class of 1957 Freshman Beanie, owned by Carl SchwarzMU-2479195314Class of 1955 blue blazerMU-399119553991Class of 1956 blazerMU-362719563627Red beanieMU-36281956
Scope and Contents
Red beanie with no numbering or lettering, likely from the class of 1956.Straw hat with "Cornell '60" written on ribbonMU-24551960Red sesquicentennial scarf created by the Johnson SchoolMU-2478201514BlazerMU-364219613642Class of 1932 blazerMU-39241932White blazer with red trim.-3924Series IV: Patches, Badges, and TagsLeather football tagMU-1356190614Felt badge of Cornell emblemMU-2480195514Kenneth C. Newman, Class of 1910, white leather square with strapsMU-2993Undated16Series V. Mascots and stuffed animalsTeddy bearMU-8121908Tan bear wearing red arm band with a white "C" on it.20
Scope and Contents
Owned by Frank Putnam Deane.Dachshund dog mascotMU-3185UndatedRed felt dog with white jacket and red "C"20Large white elephantMU-31861926White fleece elephant with red '26 pennant. Both ears are detached.18Small white elephantMU-3187UndatedSmall fleece elephant. One ear is detached.20
Scope and Contents
Likely a Class of 1926 mascot.Felt elephant mascotMU-31881926Red and white felt elephant with "Cornell" written on both ears and '26 embroidered on its right side.19Stuffed dogMU-3189UndatedStuffed white dog with painted red fur and "XXX" barrel around neck.19Bean-bag bearMU-3190UndatedRed bean-bag bear, with Cornell printed on chest and tongue sticking out.19'Cornellie' stuffed turtle mascotMU-31921928Red and white felt turtle with bonnet.20U.S. Navy vs. Cornell goatMU-3155Undated19
Scope and Contents
Yellow and blue stuffed goat with small ribbon around its neck."Pete the College Pup" bull dogMU-36181940-1955
Scope and Contents
Manufactured in Syracuse, New York.
